steps.title: Attach each cost to its variable
steps.content: $g$ is the number of 10-ride passes, and each costs $12.50$, so that cost is $12.50g$. $t$ is the number of single-ride passes, and each costs $1.50$, so that cost is $1.50t$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: This equation matches choice D. Choice C reverses the two pass costs.
